page.title: Catamaran Rental Marbella for Families: Spacious and Stable

data.meta_description: Book a catamaran rental Marbella family charter for a spacious, stable day on the Costa del Sol. From €749/2h with skipper, drinks & snacks included.
data.summary: Family-friendly catamaran rental in Marbella offers spacious stability and all-inclusive pricing. Depart from Puerto Banús with licensed skipper, drinks, and snacks included.
key_facts: Lagoon 380 catamaran: 11.6m, 10 pax, departs Puerto Banús
Lagoon 380 pricing on request via WhatsApp (all-inclusive quotes)
Licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and 21% IVA included
Soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks provided
Stable twin-hull design ideal for children and elderly guests
Shallow draft allows close-in anchoring at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés
No hidden extras – pricing is transparent and upfront

faq.q: Is the Lagoon 380 suitable for young children?
faq.a: Yes. The Lagoon 380’s wide beam and low freeboard make it very stable, so toddlers and older kids can move around safely. The skipper will anchor in calm, shallow bays like Cala Cortés where children can swim under supervision.

faq.q: What is included in the catamaran rental price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, Spanish IVA (21%), and an open bar of soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, plus light snacks. No extra charges for mooring or cleaning.

faq.q: How many people can the Lagoon 380 carry?
faq.a: The Lagoon 380 has a maximum capacity of 10 passengers plus the skipper. This makes it ideal for a family group or two families sharing the day.

faq.q: Do we need to bring our own food and drinks?
faq.a: No. Soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks are provided. If you want a specific meal or cake for a celebration, you can bring your own – there is a fridge and galley on board.

faq.q: Can we swim and snorkel during the trip?
faq.a: Absolutely. The skipper will anchor at protected spots like Cala del Faro or Cabopino, where the water is calm and clear. Snorkelling gear is usually available on request.
Your safety is the priority. If the forecast shows strong winds or high seas, we will offer you a free reschedule or full refund. The skipper monitors conditions and will adjust the route.

faq.q: How do we book a catamaran for our family?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp on the number shown on our website. We will confirm availability for the Lagoon 380, send you a booking link, and answer any specific requests you have.

data.body_html:
If you are looking for a catamaran rental Marbella family charter that combines space, stability, and all-inclusive ease, the Lagoon 380 is your best option. Unlike monohull motor yachts, catamarans offer a wide, stable platform that does not roll in a swell, making them ideal for young children, elderly parents, or anyone prone to seasickness. Our Lagoon 380 departs from Puerto Banús and can carry up to 10 passengers plus a licensed skipper. Prices start at €749 for two hours and go up to €2,299 for a full eight-hour day – and that includes drinks, snacks, fuel, insurance, and tax. No hidden extras, no surprises.

Why a catamaran works for families

A catamaran’s twin-hull design gives it a much wider beam than a monohull of the same length. The Lagoon 380 measures 11.6 metres overall but offers a living space that feels more like a 15-metre yacht. The saloon opens directly onto the aft deck, creating a single indoor-outdoor area where parents can keep an eye on children while preparing snacks. Because the hulls are separate, there is no deep V-shaped cabin to trip over – the saloon floor is flat, and the side decks have high guardrails. Children can move around without the constant tilt of a heeling monohull.

Our family-friendly catamaran: Lagoon 380

The Lagoon 380 is the only catamaran in our fleet. It is 11.6 metres long, 6.5 metres wide, and can take up to 10 passengers. It departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella’s most famous marina. The boat has four double cabins and two heads (toilets), so a large family can spread out. The forward trampoline nets are a favourite spot for children to lie on and watch the coastline. The shallow draft of just 1.2 metres means the skipper can anchor very close to the beach at spots like Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés, where the water is shallow and calm enough for safe swimming.

What’s included in the price

Every charter on our Lagoon 380 includes a licensed skipper, all fuel, insurance, Spanish IVA (21%), and a complimentary bar with soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava. Light snacks are also provided. You do not need to bring anything except sunscreen and towels. The skipper handles navigation, anchoring, and safety briefings, so you can relax. If you want to bring your own food or a birthday cake, the galley has a fridge and a stove. There is no extra charge for mooring at a restaurant dock, though any restaurant bill is yours.

Where you can go on a family catamaran trip

Departing from Puerto Banús, you have several family-friendly routes. A popular half-day option heads east towards Cabopino, a protected dune reserve with a sandy beach and calm water. The distance is about 5 nautical miles, so the sailing time is short. For a full day, you can go west to Estepona or even Sotogrande, where the coastline opens up with wider bays. The skipper will anchor for swimming and snorkelling at spots like Cala Cortés, a small cove with clear water and rocky seabed. The shallow draft of the catamaran allows it to get closer to the shore than most motor yachts.

Pricing and booking

Our Lagoon 380 is priced in Tier A: €749 for two hours, €1,199 for four hours, €1,699 for six hours, and €2,299 for eight hours. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and tax. For longer charters or custom requests, simply contact us via WhatsApp. We do not charge extra for cleaning or mooring. To see the full range of boats, visit our Marbella boat rental hub.

Safety and comfort for all ages

The Lagoon 380 has high bulwarks and guardrails all around, reducing the risk of falls. The saloon door can be latched open or closed, and the galley is equipped with a gas cooker and a fridge. Lifejackets for children and adults are on board, and the skipper will give a short safety briefing before departure. The boat’s stability means that even on a breezy day, you will not feel the constant rolling that can upset younger children. Many families choose a four-hour morning charter (10:00–14:00) when the sea is calmest and the sun is not too strong.

Frequently asked questions

Is the Lagoon 380 suitable for young children?

Yes. The Lagoon 380’s wide beam and low freeboard make it very stable, so toddlers and older kids can move around safely. The skipper will anchor in calm, shallow bays like Cala Cortés where children can swim under supervision.

What is included in the catamaran rental price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, Spanish IVA (21%), and an open bar of soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, plus light snacks. No extra charges for mooring or cleaning.

How many people can the Lagoon 380 carry?

The Lagoon 380 has a maximum capacity of 10 passengers plus the skipper. This makes it ideal for a family group or two families sharing the day.

Do we need to bring our own food and drinks?

No. Soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks are provided. If you want a specific meal or cake for a celebration, you can bring your own – there is a fridge and galley on board.

Can we swim and snorkel during the trip?

Absolutely. The skipper will anchor at protected spots like Cala del Faro or Cabopino, where the water is calm and clear. Snorkelling gear is usually available on request.

What happens in bad weather?

Your safety is the priority. If the forecast shows strong winds or high seas, we will offer you a free reschedule or full refund. The skipper monitors conditions and will adjust the route.

How do we book a catamaran for our family?

Contact us via WhatsApp on the number shown on our website. We will confirm availability for the Lagoon 380, send you a booking link, and answer any specific requests you have.

Ready to book your catamaran rental Marbella family day out? The Lagoon 380 offers the space, stability, and all-inclusive value that families need. For other options, check our full fleet of boats in Marbella or ask us directly on WhatsApp.
